basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Posts
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Notification 2026 has been released on 01 July 2026 on the official website cmd.kerala.gov.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduation with excellent proficiency in computer operations
qualification.details: First Class Graduation with excellent proficiency in computer operations.

selection_process: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.centre_for_management_development: First Class Graduation with excellent proficiency in computer operations

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First Class Graduation with excellent proficiency in computer operations.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Screening Criteria-based Screening Written Test Group Discussion Skill Test/Proficiency Test Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director recruitment is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class Graduation degree along with excellent proficiency in computer operations to be eligible for the Confidential Assistant to Managing Director position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Confidential Assistant to Managing Director post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this recruitment is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by CMD Kerala.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Confidential Assistant to Managing Director position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Confidential Assistant to Managing Director post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the post of Confidential Assistant to Managing Director in the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CMD Kerala Confidential Assistant to Managing Director recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Application Screening, Criteria-based Screening, Written Test, Group Discussion, Skill Test/Proficiency Test, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Confidential Assistant to Managing Director is a contractual role. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying.
